channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Francisco Lindor's grand slam sends Mets into NLCS with 4-1 win over Phillies in Game 4 of NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Raiders return to Aidan O'Connell as starting QB against the Steelers, benching Gardner Minshew
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — When Antonio Pierce became the Raiders' interim coach midway through last season, his first major act was naming then-rookie Aidan O'Connell the starting quarterback.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Tigers blank Guardians 3-0 in ALDS with clutch hitting and strong pitching, taking 2-1 series lead
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Riley Greene and Spencer Torkelson each drove in a run, and six pitchers combined to lift the Detroit Tigers to a 3-0 win over Cleveland Guardians on Wednesday and a 2-1 lead in their AL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saints announce rookie Spencer Rattler will start for injured Derek Carr vs. Buccaneers
item.description: With Derek Carr sidelined for multiple weeks with an oblique injury, the New Orleans Saints are turning to rookie quarterback Spencer Rattler this week against the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A 4-1 start has created long-starved hope and optimism around the Washington Commanders
item.description: There's reason for hope around the Washington Commanders for the first time since the team has had this name.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 2 teams suing NASCAR ask court to recognize them as chartered while antitrust case proceeds
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The two teams suing NASCAR asked a judge for a preliminary injunction Wednesday so they can compete next season under the charter system they are challenging as their antitrust case moves through federal court.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders make quarterback change as Davante Adams rumors heat up
item.description: As the Las Vegas Raiders try their best to make star wide receiver Davante Adams happy, they announced that Aidan O'Connell will start this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Troy Aikman says he heard Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are engaged: 'I might have broke the story'
item.description: Troy Aikman slipped up Monday night when he referred to Taylor Swift as Travis Kelce's "missus," but he says he heard a rumor the two are engaged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SEC means more ... upsets? Three top 10 teams fall, led by Vanderbilt's vanquishing of Alabama
item.description: Lane Kiffin wasn’t ready to talk about his own game yet. The Mississippi coach fixated instead on the final moments of Vanderbilt’s stunning upset of then-No. 1 Alabama. “Sorry, I mean this is a once-in-a-lifetime thing going on,” Kiffin told reporters after the Rebels’ win over South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phillies one defeat from elimination after 7-2 loss to Mets in Game 3 of NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets owner says firing of Saleh will bring 'new energy' to one of franchise's 'most talented teams'
item.description: Woody Johnson sensed his struggling New York Jets needed a change — and now. So the owner made the stunning decision Tuesday to fire coach Robert Saleh just five games into his fourth season after the team's 2-3 start following a 23-17 loss to Minnesota in London on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 on Sunday night to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Kevin Yu birdies 18th twice and wins Sanderson Farms in playoff for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Kevin Yu made a 15-foot birdie on the 18th hole for a 5-under 67, and he birdied it again from 6 feet in a playoff to beat Beau Hossler and win the Sanderson Farms Championship on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake ready for road test: Unbeaten streak at stake against San Jose Earthquakes
item.description: Real Salt Lake (4th place Western Conference, 53 points) kept a clean sheet at home against Minnesota on Wednesday and now head back on the road with a four-match unbeaten streak to face the San Jose Earthquakes (14th place, Western Conference, 21 points) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4

item.title: Padres beat Braves to advance to NLDS
item.description: The Padres booked their ticket to the National League Division Series on Wednesday, defeating the Atlanta Braves 5-4 in Game 2 of the Wild Card Series at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5
